passive.name: The Darkin Scythe
passive.description:
Kayn wields an ancient weapon and fights Rhaast, the darkin within it, for control. Either the Darkin will triumph, or Kayn will master Rhaast and become the Shadow Assassin.

Darkin: Heal for a percentage of spell damage dealt to champions.

Shadow Assassin: For the first few seconds in combat with enemy champions, deal bonus damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever {{ci|Kayn}} scores champion {{tip|takedown|takedowns}} or deals damage against champions, he earns orbs that unlocks his {{ci|Rhaast|Darkin}} and {{ci|Shadow Assassin}} forms. '''Kayn''' can return to the [[Spawn|summoning platform]] to transform, permanently empowering his abilities.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
[[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} If '''Kayn''' has been [[combat status|out of combat]] for a period, his attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} for a short time upon entering combat.

[[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} '''Rhaast''' {{tip|heals}} for a portion of the damage he deals to enemy champions with his [[champion ability|abilities]].
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Kayn''' has a secondary {{tt|experience bar|Additional info in the notes below}} that tracks progress toward his {{ci|Rhaast|Darkin}} and {{ci|Shadow Assassin}} forms. He gathers orbs from champion {{tip|takedown|takedowns}} and each instance of damage (excluding [[damage over time]]) dealt against champions. Once he has earned enough orbs, he unlocks a form based on whether he earned more from {{tip|melee}} or {{tip|ranged}} champions (for {{ci|Rhaast|Darkin}} and {{ci|Shadow Assassin}}, respectively), with the other form unlocked later.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Kayn''' can move near the [[Spawn|summoning platform]] to transform over 6 seconds, restoring to full {{as|health}} and {{as|mana}} and becoming {{tip|invulnerable}}, {{tip|untargetable}}, and unable to act for the duration. '''Kayn''' cannot choose a form if he is unable to cast abilities. The transformation will grant a passive bonus and permanently empower some of '''Kayn's''' abilities based on the form chosen. He gains a one-time [[Homeguard]] once the transformation is complete.
wiki_detail.description3: [[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} If '''Kayn''' has been [[combat status|out of combat]] with enemy champions for over 8 seconds, or he casts ''{{ai|Umbral Trespass|Kayn}}'', upon entering combat and lasting for 3 seconds, he deals {{pp|key=%|20 to 40}} of {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} dealt against enemy champions as {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}, also applying on the first instance of damage dealt. If this effect is ready, it will not be lost by taking damage.
wiki_detail.description4: [[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} '''Rhaast''' {{tip|heals}} for 25% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.5}}% per 100 '''bonus''' health)}} of the {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} {{tip|physical damage|{{as|physical damage}}}} that he deals to enemy champions with his [[champion ability|abilities]].
wiki_detail.notes:
* Entering transformation will not {{tip|Homing projectile destruction|destroy}} in-flight {{tip|projectile|projectiles}}. ; The Orb System The experience is depicted as orbs that drop upon the ground. {{tip|Melee}} champions drop red orbs that grant progress towards {{ci|Rhaast|Darkin}}, while {{tip|ranged}} champions drop blue orbs that grant progress for {{ci|Shadow Assassin}}. Orbs will remain on the ground until automatically collected by '''Kayn''' regardless of range once he leaves [[combat status|combat]]. The orbs will be collected even if '''Kayn''' {{tip|death|dies}}. The experience bar above his portrait gauges his current progression, the color reflects the form with greater progress. '''Kayn''' can transform by interacting with his portrait, and can wait 4 minutes until the other form becomes available, reduced by 5 seconds for each collected orb of their type after that. * ''Melee'' orbs grant 2 points per hit and 6 points per takedown. * ''Ranged'' orbs grant 3 points per hit and 7 points per takedown. * The amount of points received per orb is multiplied by {{pp|type=minutes|3;3+(10-3)/8*(x-1) for 6; then + (10-3)/8*x*1.15|0;5 to 13 by 1|formula=Increases each second after 5 minutes. At 10 minutes it increases by 15% more per second until it caps at 13 minutes.}}. * The bar gets filled up completely at 500 points. * If the two forms are within 8% of each other, the last champion range type hit will determine the winner. If both types are hit at the same time, the trasformation will default to {{ci|Rhaast|Darkin}}. * Each side's bar has a bucket system, starting at 60 points. ** Each time an orb is taken the system checks if there's an amount of points in the bucket equal to or higher than the amount received from the orb.
If there is, '''Kayn''' is given an additional orb of the same type he received, while also subtracting that amount of points from the bucket. ** The bucket fills by {{fd|0.8}} points per second if out of champion combat for 70 seconds. * Damage dealt by {{tip|persistent damage|damage over time}} effects and specifically {{ri|First Strike}} and {{ri|Summon Aery}} will not grant orbs.
wiki_detail.flavorsound: {{sm2|Kayn Original Assassin SFX Passive Transform.ogg}}{{ccib|Kayn_OriginalCircle_Shadow_Assassin.png|size=24}} {{sm2|Kayn Original Slayer SFX Passive Transform.ogg}}{{ccib|Kayn_OriginalCircle_Rhaast.png|size=24}} Transformation alert.

Q.name: Reaping Slash
Q.description: Kayn dashes, then slashes. Both deal damage.
Q.tooltip:
Kayn dashes then spins his scythe, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage to enemies he passes through, then deals the damage again to nearby enemies.

Darkin Slayer: Instead deal {{ darkinflatdamage }} plus {{ darkinpercentdamage }} max Health physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kayn}} {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies he passes through. He then swings his scythe, dealing the same damage to surrounding enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb4: [[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Reaping Slash'' deals damage based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kayn''' {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies he passes through. He then swings his scythe, dealing the same damage to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|75 to 155}} {{as|(+ 85% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|75*2 to 155*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|85*2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Both instances of ''Reaping Slash'' deal {{as|40 '''bonus''' physical damage}} against {{tip|minion|minions}} and {{tip|monster|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|75+40 to 155+40}} {{as|(+ 85% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|(75+40)*2 to (155+40)*2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|85*2}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: [[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Reaping Slash's'' damage is modified to deal {{as|65% AD}} {{as|(+ 6% {{as|(+ {{fd|3.5}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health)}} {{as|physical damage}} with each hit, for a total of {{as|{{ap|65*2}}% AD}} {{as|(+ {{ap|6*2}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|3.5*2}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health)}}. This damage has a cap against monsters that does not include the '''bonus''' damage.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Capped Monster Damage per Hit|{{ap|200 to 400}}|Total Capped Monster Damage|{{ap|200*2 to 400*2}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Reaping Slash's dash speed scales with '''Kayn's''' {{sti|ms|{{as|'''total''' movement speed}}}}.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will block only a single instance of damage - either the dash or the slash.
* If the {{tip|dash}} is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}, '''Kayn''' will not swing his scythe.
* ''Reaping Slash's '' swing can be performed quicker if the dash stops prematurely upon colliding with terrain.
* As the {{ci|Shadow Assassin}}, an [[File:Kayn Reaping Slash A.png|20px|border]] alternate icon for Reaping Slash is used but has no modified effect.
* Other abilities can be queued while casting ''Reaping Slash''.
* [[Active ability items|Item actives]] are locked out while casting.
* The swing's animation has a {{fd|0.25}}-second {{tip|lockout}} time.<!--The dash + swing takes about 0.66 seconds-->
** '''Kayn''' will only be able to move after {{fd|0.416}} seconds.
_comments: The dash + swing takes about 0.66 seconds

W.name: Blade's Reach
W.description: Kayn damages and slows targets in a line.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kayn}} swings his scythe in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
[[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Blade's Reach's'' area is extended. '''Kayn''' conjures a shadow to perform ''Blade's Reach'' in his stead, removing the ability's cast time.

[[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Blade's Reach'' briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kayn''' swings his scythe in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 90% decaying over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: [[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Blade's Reach's'' radius is extended by 200 units. '''Kayn''' conjures an {{tip|untargetable}} ''shadow'' at the casting position to perform ''Blade's Reach's'' sweep over {{fd|0.55}} seconds in his stead, removing the ability's cast time.
wiki_detail.description3: [[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Blade's Reach'' {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} enemies hit for 1 second.

E.name: Shadow Step

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Kayn}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, {{tip|ghosting}} and the ability to enter terrain for a duration. If he has recently been [[combat status|in combat]] with enemy champions, the duration is dramatically reduced.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Kayn''' {{tip|heals}} himself upon entering terrain for the first time from casting ''Shadow Step''. If he receives damage or deals damage against an enemy {{tip|champion}} during ''Shadow Step'', the duration is dramatically reduced.
wiki_detail.blurb4: [[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Shadow Step'' has a reduced {{sti|cooldown}}. '''Kayn''' gains {{tip|slow resist}} and more {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while in terrain.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kayn''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|40% '''bonus total''' movement speed}}}}, {{tip|ghosting}} and the ability to ignore terrain collision for a duration. If he has been [[combat status|in combat]] with enemy champions within the last 3 seconds, ''Shadow Step'' will instead last {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Kayn''' {{tip|heals}} himself upon entering terrain for the first time from casting ''Shadow Step'' and he gains {{tip|unobstructed vision}} while inside.
wiki_detail.description3: Receiving damage from or dealing damage to an enemy {{tip|champion}} while ''Shadow Step'' is active reduces its remaining duration to {{fd|1.5}} seconds. This effect also cannot remain active out of terrain for longer than {{fd|1.5}} seconds and will cancel immediately if '''Kayn''' performs a [[basic attack]] or becomes {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}}, excluding from {{tip|sleep}}{{bug}}, or {{tip|polymorph|polymorphed}}.
wiki_detail.description4: [[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Shadow Step's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced to 10 seconds at all ranks. '''Kayn''' gains 100% {{tip|slow resist}} while active and, upon entering terrain, the {{as|'''bonus total''' movement speed}} is increased to {{as|70%|ms}} for the remaining duration.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* As {{ci|Rhaast}}, an [[File:Shadow Step R.png|20px|border]] alternate icon for Shadow Step is used but has no modified effect.
* The {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} {{tip|stacks multiplicatively}} with other sources of movement speed boosts.
* Self {{tip|immobilize|immobilizations}} such as {{ii|Zhonya's Hourglass}} also count for interrupting ''Shadow Step''.
* {{si|Recall}} is disabled while '''Kayn''' is inside terrain.
* Enemies cannot see '''Kayn''' while he is inside of terrain unless they have terrain-piercing vision, such as {{ai|Heightened Senses|Quinn}}, {{ai|Hawkshot|Ashe}} or {{tip|unobstructed vision}}.
** However, enemies and allies (including '''Kayn''') will be notified when nearby terrain is infested if '''Kayn''' is within 1000 units of an enemy champion - with an indicator being placed on the terrain with a direct line between '''Kayn''' and the enemy champion. ''Slightly less than standard sight radius, but more than the {{tip|camouflage}} detection radius.''
* '''Kayn''' can move up to 550 units beyond the outer-edge of the battlefield.
* ''Shadow Step'' can interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* If '''Kayn''' is inside terrain when the effect ends, he will be placed correspondingly to the nearest valid space.
* {{tip|Sleep}} will not interrupt ''Shadow Step''.{{bug}}

R.name: Umbral Trespass
R.description: Kayn hides in an enemy's body, dealing massive damage when he bursts out.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Champions damaged by Kayn are marked for 3.15 seconds.

Kayn infests a marked enemy, becoming Untargetable. After {{ infestduration }} seconds or after Recasting, Kayn bursts out, dealing {{ damage }} physical damage to the enemy.

Shadow Assassin: Increases this Ability's range, the distance Kayn exits, and refreshes The Darkin Scythe's Cooldown on exit.

Darkin Slayer: Instead deals {{ slayerdamage }} max Health physical damage and restores {{ healvalue }} Health ({{ slayerhealpercent*100 }}% damage amount).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Kayn}} ''marks'' enemy champions he damaged for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kayn''' {{tip|vanish|vanishes}} and {{tip|dash|dashes}} to a ''marked'' enemy champion. Upon arrival, he {{tip|channel|channels}} for a short time, {{tip|attach|attaching}} to the target and {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Kayn''' deals {{as|physical damage}} to the target and {{tip|dash|dashes}} out from their body in the target direction.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
[[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Umbral Trespass'' has increased range. Emerging will {{sti|cdr|reset}} ''{{ai|The Darkin Scythe A|Kayn|The Darkin Scythe's}}'' cooldown.

[[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Umbral Trespass'' deals damage based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}, and {{tip|heals}} him for a portion of the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Kayn''' ''marks'' enemy champions he damaged in the last {{fd|3.15}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Kayn''' {{tip|vanish|vanishes}} and {{tip|dash|dashes}} to a ''marked'' enemy champion. Upon arrival, he {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to {{fd|2.5}} seconds, {{tip|attach|attaching}} to the target and {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them. ''Umbral Trespass'' can be recast after {{fd|0.75}} seconds during the channel, and does so automatically after the duration or if it is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} After a {{fd|0.75}}-second delay, '''Kayn''' deals {{as|physical damage}} to the target and {{tip|dash|dashes}} out from their body in the target direction, detaching himself from them and becoming targetable again at the end of the dash.
wiki_detail.description4: [[File:Shadow Assassin OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Shadow Assassin Bonus:}} ''Umbral Trespass'' gains 200 '''bonus''' cast range and emerge range. Additionally, emerging will reset ''{{ai|The Darkin Scythe A|Kayn|The Darkin Scythe's}}'' {{sti|cooldown}}.
wiki_detail.description5: [[File:Rhaast OriginalSquare.png|20px|border|link=]] {{sbc|Darkin Bonus:}} ''Umbral Trespass'' is modified to deal {{as|physical damage}} equal to {{as|15% {{as|(+ 10% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health}}, and {{tip|heals}} him for {{as|{{ap|15*0.75}}% {{as|(+ {{ap|10*0.75}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of the target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
*The initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}}.
**Detonating the ability manually does not.
**The ability activation happens when '''Kayn''' is attached to his target and the channel starts.
***{{ci|Kassadin}} cannot gain a stack for {{ai|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} because '''Kayn''' is untargetable during the activation.
* The ability will recast if '''Kayn''' is ordered a movement command.
* The amount of time it takes for '''Kayn''' to {{tip|attach}} to his target is between {{fd|0.5}} seconds (cast from max range, not as {{ci|Shadow Assassin}}) and {{fd|0.25}} seconds (cast from point blank range).
** This duration is fixed, meaning '''Kayn''' will attach regardless of how far away the target gets while he is {{tip|dash|dashing}} toward them.
* If the target {{tip|death|dies}}, enters {{tip|resurrection}}, or is sent to the {{ai|Realm of Death|Mordekaiser}} while '''Kayn''' is {{tip|attached}}, he will instantly detach and reappear on top of the target's location. This does not occur if '''Kayn''' is in the process of emerging from the target.
** If those same conditions occur before the attachment, '''Kayn''' will reappear at the target's location after completing the dash.
*** In both of these cases, ''Umbral Trespass'' will occasionally not go on cooldown.{{bug}}
** '''Kayn''' will automatically emerge when attached to a {{tip|clone}} that expires.
* If '''Kayn''' dies while {{tip|attached}} and the recast is available, ''Umbral Trespass' '' damage is dealt immediately. If the recast is not available, ''Umbral Trespass' '' damage is not dealt at all.
** Entering {{tip|resurrection}} while {{tip|attached}} does not deal ''Umbral Trespass' '' damage regardless of if the recast is available or not.
*** '''Kayn''' will detach immediately in both cases.
* During ''Umbral Trespass'', '''Kayn''' will not take the self-inflicted damage from {{iis|Death's Dance}} {{nie|Ignore Pain}} if the damage was sourced from a {{tip|turret}}.
* As {{ci|Rhaast}}, ''Umbral Trespass'' will grant the {{tip|heal}} automatically if the target dies during the channel.
** The heal is not granted if the target dies before the channel starts.
* ''Umbral Trespass' '' interactions with {{tip|crowd control}}:
** Being {{tip|stun|stunned}} or {{tip|silence|silenced}} or falling {{tip|asleep}} while {{tip|attach|attached}} will cause the ability to recast automatically (even during the {{fd|0.75}}-second delay before '''Kayn''' is able to recast after attaching).
** ''Umbral Trespass'' {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}} '''Kayn''' from {{tip|drowsy|drowsiness}}.
** '''Kayn''' is immune to {{tip|flee|fear}} during ''Umbral Trespass''.
** {{tip|Root|Roots}} will not prevent '''Kayn''' from initiating the recast.
** {{tip|Airborne|Displacements}} cannot interrupt the initial dash and neither can they apply while '''Kayn''' is attached. If the ''airborne'' source applies a [[debuff]], '''Kayn''' attaches to his target immediately, ending the dash prematurely in the process. The debuff is also removed instantly.
* Until the recast or after the duration, the ability will have had no effect on the target for the purposes of {{ri|Electrocute}} or the 'in-combat' status.
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will prevent '''Kayn''' from infesting the target, but will do nothing to mitigate the recast when used once he has already infested them.
** If '''Kayn''' targets an enemy that is currently being protected by a ''spell shield'', the ability will simply go on cooldown without making him infest his target.
*** This is also true for {{cai|Riposte|Fiora}}.
* ''Umbral Trespass'' cannot be cast on targetable {{tip|zombie state|zombie states}} such as {{ci|Sion}} during {{ai|Glory in Death|Sion}}.
* '''Kayn''' will draw {{tip|turret}} aggro after the recast's dash, despite the damage occurring while he was untargetable.
* The damage is '''not''' blocked if the target becomes {{tip|untargetable}}.
* '''Kayn''' will copy his target's total [[size]] for ''Umbral Trespass' '' duration, even if their size is smaller than his.
* The screen will direct to the target's position upon attaching.
* As {{ci|Rhaast}}, an [[File:Kayn Umbral Trespass R.png|20px|border]] alternate icon is used for the initial activation of Umbral Trespass.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Kayn''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}} and dashing out of the victim:
** The dash out is not interrupted by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}.
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,interrupts|interrupts=death,silence}}
